input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.6.1
            TITLE: when forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.1: When forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:
T.7.6.1 When forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles:   
Inboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the outside of 
the front tires at the height of the hubs.

final_answer: When forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles: Inboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the outside of the front tires at the height of the hubs.
